titleStmt.title: SII 7.563: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 563. (A.R. No. 336 of 1901). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE ANJANEYA TEMPLE AT THE NORTH GATE OF THE SAME FORT.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrīgaṇādhipataEnnamaḥ . namastuṁgaśirastuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhuvē . svasti śrī . jayābhyudaya śālivāhana
śakavaruṣaṁbulu . 1499 Agunēṭi dhātu saṁvvatsara māgha śu 12 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīraśrīraṁgarāyadēvamahārāya
lu pṛthivisthirasāmrājyaṁ sēyucunnuṁḍḍagānu kritamaṭu piṁggaḷa saṁvvatsara caitra śu 5 nāḍu śrīvīratirumaladēvamahārāyala savaramu cannappanāyuniṁgāru
penugoṁḍa paṭṭaṇaṁ kaṭṭuka yēlucunnu tirumaladēvamahārāyala pratāpāna penugoṁḍḍapedakōṭaku prati pillakōṭa preti vākiḷu burujulu Agaḍata modalaInavi kaṭṭicci peda
kōṭa [A]gaḍinni durggaṁkōṭānu jīrnnōdhāraṇaṁ sēyiṁccenu penugoṁḍa mārakāpuracannarāyani kṛphavallanu kṣaya saṁvvatsara puṣyamāsāna vaṁccikasarukānuni jayiṁccenu vibhava saṁvatsa
ra vaiśākhamāsāna vaṁcinamālikhānuṁḍu modalaIna saradārula jayiṁccenu dhātasaṁvatsara mārggaśira baha 1 nāḍu vaccina yēdulaśāhini jayiṁccenu penugoṁḍḍa paṭṭaṇaṁ daivanirmitaṣaina
dēvapaṭṭaṇamu yī paṭṇaṁlaggala jayiṁccenanēvāni koḍku kōṣṭhaṁ Iyadhidēvatābhū Ani vēyiṁccina śāsanānaku maṁgaḷamahā śrī śrī śrī jēyunu .
Digital edition of SII 7.563 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
